name: HTML/CSS to Image
description: Render arbitrary HTML + CSS to a PNG/JPEG/WebP. Unlike URL-to-screenshot APIs, this takes raw markup and renders it — great for templated images, social cards, OG images, certificates, charts. HTTP Basic auth with user_id + api_key.

tools.name: image
tools.description: Render HTML + CSS to an image. Returns a JSON object with `url` pointing at the hosted image. Use `template_id` to render against a previously-saved template instead of inline HTML. NOTE: this template uses HTTP Basic auth — the dashboard's connect form should accept user_id + api_key, and apteva will base64 them as user_id:api_key automatically.

selector.description: CSS selector — render only this element

ms_delay.description: Wait this many ms after page load before rendering

template_id.description: ID of a saved template to render against

template_data.description: Variables to interpolate into the template

tools.name: get_image
tools.description: Get details about a previously-rendered image by id.

tools.name: create_template
tools.description: Create a saved HTML template you can render later by id with template_data variables.
